rule.name: Ensure that S3 Buckets are configured with 'Block public access (bucket settings)'
rule.description: Amazon S3 provides `Block public access (bucket settings)` and `Block public access (account settings)` to help you manage public access to Amazon S3 resources.
rule.impact: Non-compliance with CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations 2.1.5 — Ensure that S3 Buckets are configured with 'Block public access (bucket settings)'
rule.remediation: Remediate per CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations v1.5.0 section 2.1.5.

message: [cis_aws/2.1.5] failed: Ensure that S3 Buckets are configured with 'Block public access (bucket settings)'
